title: Cyclic Reimagined
body:
Are you tired of the **not good-looking** textures and models In **_[Cyclic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cyclic)_**?

This pack **remakes _most_ of the textures and models**.

I spent **half a year** making it,because it includes
- **_781_ textures**
- **_165_ custom models**
- **Fixing _translation errors_ and _code exposures_ in Chinese language**

Enjoy it!
